title: Require Artifact Index Aggregate Shape
forbids: artifacts/index.ts barrels that omit sibling artifact modules, duplicate module registration, rebuild parallel contract or validator maps, or own non-artifact wiring
why: Artifact owner files pair one contract with one complete validator. The directory index registers every sibling module exactly once with defineArtifactCatalog and derives both producer modules and consumer handles from that single authority.
remediate: Keep artifacts/index.ts limited to the contract-only defineArtifactCatalog import, sibling namespace imports from ./*.artifact.js, one catalog declaration, and the derived artifactModules = catalog.modules and artifacts = catalog.artifacts exports.
message: Artifact directory indexes must stay aggregate-only.
